title: NSEC Online Admission
steps: Visit the admission portal and click on 'Register Now'
Complete registration by filling the form and uploading required documents
Ensure documents are scanned in PDF format (max 150 DPI)
Upload all required documents with proper naming format
Click on 'Submit & Next' to generate Enquiry ID
Use Enquiry ID as login ID and registered phone number as password
After confirmation from college, login again and fill the admission form
Submit the form and generate printable format
Keep a printout or softcopy for reference (no need to submit unless asked)
document_guidelines: Upload documents in PDF format only
Use naming format: DocumentName StudentName Rank Stream (e.g. 10thadmit SajalSaha 17898 AEIE)

contact.note: Contact these numbers for admission confirmation or queries
